basic_details.job_title: NIT Warangal JRF Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 24 April 2026 on the official website of NIT Warangal. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age relaxation applicable as per institute rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech in Civil Engineering or Agricultural Engineering (First Class), M.E./M.Tech in Water Resources Engineering and Allied specializations (First Class)
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow: Essential: B.E./B.Tech in Civil Engineering or Agricultural Engineering with First class; M.E./M.Tech in Water Resources Engineering and Allied specializations with First Class. Desirable: GATE Qualification, Hydrological Modelling, Programming skills in R/Python/MATLAB, Good analytical ability and competency in writing skills.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Warangal JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 25th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.E./B.Tech in Civil or Agricultural Engineering (First Class) and an M.E./M.Tech in Water Resources Engineering or allied specializations (First Class).

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the JRF post is 30 years, with age relaxation applicable as per institute rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The salary for the JRF position ranges from Rs. 37,000/- to Rs. 42,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the NIT Warangal JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Ensure you attach all required documents and clearly mention the post in the subject line.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a screening of applications followed by an interview, which can be conducted online or offline.

faq.question: Q8. Which department is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal).

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number is NITW/CED/WRE/JD/PMECRG/01/.

faq.question: Q10. What are the desirable qualifications for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Desirable qualifications include GATE qualification, experience in Hydrological Modelling, programming skills in R/Python/MATLAB, and good analytical and writing skills.
